title: terebinthus inaguensis
intro: Terebinthus inaguensis, also known as the Inagua Juniper or Bahamian juniper, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Inagua Islands in the Bahamas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily derived from its resin, which is rich in terpenes and has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Terebinthus inaguensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate arthritis symptoms. The herbal preparations of Terebinthus inaguensis include essential oils, tinctures, and infused waters that can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
